'''ngalawa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:whalesucker|whalesucker]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-l-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:whalesucker|whalesucker]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| ngalawa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngælæwæth|ngælæwæth]] || [[word:ngælæwæj|ngælæwæj]] || [[word:ngælæwæsh|ngælæwæsh]] || [[word:ngælæwæ|ngælæwæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngalalawath|ngalalawath]] || [[word:ngalalawaj|ngalalawaj]] || [[word:ngalalawash|ngalalawash]] || [[word:ngalalawa|ngalalawa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngalawath|ngalawath]] || [[word:ngalawaj|ngalawaj]] || [[word:ngalawash|ngalawash]] || [[word:ngalawa|ngalawa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngalafwath|ngalafwath]] || [[word:ngalafwaj|ngalafwaj]] || [[word:ngalafwash|ngalafwash]] || [[word:ngalafwaf|ngalafwaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngalawatha|ngalawatha]] || [[word:ngalawaja|ngalawaja]] || [[word:ngalawasha|ngalawasha]] || [[word:ngalawaka|ngalawaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngalawath|ngalawath]] || [[word:ngalawaj|ngalawaj]] || [[word:ngalawash|ngalawash]] || [[word:ngalawa|ngalawa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngalawathal|ngalawathal]] || [[word:ngalawajal|ngalawajal]] || [[word:ngalawashal|ngalawashal]] || [[word:ngalawakal|ngalawakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngalawathatha|ngalawathatha]] || [[word:ngalawajaja|ngalawajaja]] || [[word:ngalawashasha|ngalawashasha]] || [[word:ngalawaka|ngalawaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngalawathan|ngalawathan]] || [[word:ngalawajan|ngalawajan]] || [[word:ngalawashan|ngalawashan]] || [[word:ngalawakan|ngalawakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngalawathaoro|ngalawathaoro]] || [[word:ngalawajaoro|ngalawajaoro]] || [[word:ngalawashaoro|ngalawashaoro]] || [[word:ngalawakaoro|ngalawakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
